subject: [CDS-STRIMZI] Migrate cds to use strimzi kafka
commit_message:
[CDS-STRIMZI] Migrate cds to use strimzi kafka

Move cds to use strimzi kafka

Signed-off-by: efiacor <fiachra.corcoran@est.tech>
Change-Id: I89a64399d677584829e6408c8f72e9b5ad41cabd
Issue-ID: DMAAP-1706

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 7 on the queue.

Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/4876/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/4876/ )
